## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX operates as a services marketing agency, focusing on AI-driven organic SEO content creation](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Managing Editors are central to client-facing delivery, handling 15-25 pieces of content weekly across 3-5 clients](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Gaby has extensive experience in marketing, content creation, and AI integration across multiple agencies](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [GrowthX is experiencing rapid growth and seeking to scale efficiently while maintaining high-quality work](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Role Overview

  - [Services marketing agency model delivering organic SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Focus on AI-driven content creation using internal platform (Atlas)](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Managing Editors:](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [Central to client-facing delivery org](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [Project manage 3-5 clients, \~5 articles/week each](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Edit 15-25 pieces of content weekly](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [Interface with content managers using AI pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [Provide feedback to engineering team on AI improvements](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Candidate Background (Gaby Brogan)

  - [10 years experience: Accenture (management consulting) → ad tech startup → freelance marketing consultant (7 years)](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Current roles:](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [Head of Content at King's Crest Global (5 years)](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
          - [Manages entire content team](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
          - [Integrated AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Jasper) into workflow](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [Strategic marketing at Culture Kids (Gen Z focus)](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Strong project management and organizational skills](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Extensive experience with AI content generation and editing](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

### AI Integration in Content Creation

  - [Gaby's experience:](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [Automated blog creation across diverse industries](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Uses AI for creative direction and brand voice work](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Integrated AI into idea generation, content creation, editing](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [AI strengths: Efficiency, idea enhancement when given unique input](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [AI weaknesses: Editing process still requires significant human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/E93pCE7YQJ_qFQeQRi4ChKD5o8rQMzPs?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

### GrowthX Growth and Vision
